name: Ability Score Improvement
desc: You can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1.
You can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feat.

name: Alert
desc: You gain the following benefits:
• You can't be surprised while you are conscious.
• You have a +5 bonus to Initiative.

name: Athletic
desc: You gain the following benefits:
• You have proficiency in the Athletics skill.
• You can add double your proficiency bonus to any Strength (Athletics) check you make.

name: Backstabber
desc: You gain the following benefits:
• You have proficiency in the Stealth skill.
• When you hit a creature that is unaware of you, you deal an extra 1d6 damage of the weapon's type.

name: Crossbow Expert
desc: You gain the following benefits:
• You ignore the loading property of crossbows.
• Being within 5 feet of a hostile creature doesn't impose Disadvantage on your ranged attack rolls.
• You can use a bonus action to fire a hand crossbow you are holding.

name: Dual Wielder
desc: You gain the following benefits:
• You gain a +1 bonus to AC while you are wielding a separate melee weapon in each hand.
• You can use two-weapon fighting even when the melee weapons you are wielding aren't light.
• You can draw or stow two one-handed weapons when you would normally be able to draw or stow only one.

name: Durable
desc: You gain the following benefits:
• Your hit point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 again whenever you gain this feat.
• You have proficiency in Constitution saving throws.

name: Healer
desc: You gain the following benefits:
• You can use a bonus action to heal a creature that has 0 hit points.
• The creature regains hit points equal to 5 + your proficiency bonus.
• You can use this feat a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.

name: Insightful
desc: You gain the following benefits:
• You gain a +2 bonus to Wisdom (Insight) checks.
• You can use your Insight to discern when a creature is lying or hiding its true intentions.

name: Keen-Sighted
desc: You gain the following benefits:
• Your darkvision range increases by 30 feet.
• You have Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

name: Light Armor Master
desc: You gain the following benefits:
• You have a +1 bonus to AC while wearing light armor.
• You can use your Dexterity modifier instead of your Strength modifier for the damage roll of a light weapon.

name: Metamagic Adept
desc: You gain the following benefits:
• You learn two Metamagic options of your choice from the sorcerer class feature.
• You gain 2 sorcery points to spend on Metamagic (these points are added to any sorcery points you have from another source).
• You regain all spent sorcery points when you finish a long rest.

name: Observant
desc: You gain the following benefits:
• Your Intelligence (Investigation) and Wisdom (Perception) checks increase by +5.
• You can read lips.
• You recognize a creature you have seen before.

name: Resilient
desc: Choose one ability score. You gain the following benefits:
• You gain proficiency in saving throws using that ability.
• Your proficiency bonus is doubled for any saving throw that uses the chosen ability score.

name: Sharpshooter
desc: You gain the following benefits:
• You can make ranged attacks without penalty for being within 5 feet of a hostile creature.
• You can ignore cover when making ranged attacks.
• You can choose to take a -5 penalty to the attack roll to deal an extra +10 damage on a hit.

name: Skulker
desc: You gain the following benefits:
• You can try to hide when you are lightly obscured from the creature from which you are hiding.
• When you are hidden from a creature, you can try to make a Stealth check to remain hidden even after you make an attack.
• You have Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing.

name: Tough
desc: Your hit point maximum increases by 2 per level you have attained.

name: Warcaster
desc: You gain the following benefits:
• You have Advantage on Constitution saving throws that you make to maintain your concentration on a spell.
• You can perform the somatic components of spells even when you have weapons or a shield in one or both hands.

• When a hostile creature's movement provokes an opportunity attack from you, you can use your reaction to cast a spell at the creature, rather than making an opportunity attack. The spell must have a casting time of 1 action and must target only that creature.

name: Defensive Duelist
desc: When you are wielding a finesse weapon and are targeted by a melee attack, you can use your reaction to add your proficiency bonus to your AC, potentially causing the attack to miss.

name: Grappler
desc: You gain the following benefits:
• You have Advantage on Strength (Athletics) checks made to grapple or shove a creature.
• You can grapple a creature that is two sizes larger than you.

name: Mobile
desc: You gain the following benefits:
• Difficult terrain doesn't cost you extra movement while you're moving.
• When you make a melee attack against a creature, you don't provoke opportunity attacks from that creature for the rest of the turn, even if you hit.
• When you hit a creature with a melee attack, you can move up to 10 feet without provoking opportunity attacks from that creature.
